SEARCH

Uses of Package
com.nib.commons.esql

Packages that use com.nib.commons.esql
Package
Description
com.nib.commons
Common utilities and core runtime components for the NIB application framework.
com.nib.commons.esql
API classes for Embedded SQL (E/SQL) integration and runtime support.
com.nib.commons.io.catalog
Provides catalog management mechanisms for I/O operations.
com.nib.commons.io.tools
Provides command-line tools and utilities for file system operations.
com.nib.commons.io.vsam
Provides classes and interfaces for emulating VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organizations.
com.nib.scripting
NIB scripting framework.
com.nib.scripting.utils.dbutils
DB API
com.nib.supernaut.files
File control and access management for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.queues
Transient Data (TD) and Temporary Storage (TS) queue management for Supernaut.
  • Classes in com.nib.commons.esql used by com.nib.commons
    Class
    Description
    DatabaseConnection
    DatabaseConnection represents a JDBC connection to a relational database.
  • Classes in com.nib.commons.esql used by com.nib.commons.esql
    Class
    Description
    AbstractNSqlCommand
    This abstract class represents a SQL command.
    DatabaseConnection
    DatabaseConnection represents a JDBC connection to a relational database.
    DatabaseFamily
    DatabaseFamily represents the type of database.
    NHostVariablesList
     
    NHostVariablesMap
    This class extends HashMap and is used to map a String key to an NHostVariable object.
    NSqlCommand
    NSqlCommand class extends AbstractNSqlCommand and provides methods to prepare and execute SQL commands.
    NSqlCursor.NSqlCursorUpdate
     
    NSqlException
    NSqlException class extends Exception and provides a custom exception for SQL errors.
    Sqlca
    Sqlca class extends NGroup and provides a structure for SQL communication area.
    Sqlca.Sqlwarn
    Sqlwarn class provides a structure for SQL warning flags.
    SqlCondition
    SqlCondition is an enum that provides the possible conditions for SQL errors.
    SqlError
    SqlError class provides a structure for SQL errors.
